platform_notes: Older Telerik AcclaimWeb (2012.1.214), NOT the modern Kendo version (Broward/Saint Lucie). Uses Telerik TreeView for name disambiguation. ExportCsv endpoint delivers all rows in one GET after step 2.
search_flow: POST /search/SearchTypeName?Length=6 {name, doctype, dates} → Telerik TreeView HTML
POST /Search/SearchTypePreName {checked nodes + context} → grid page (empty skeleton)
